destinations.subtitle: From the Bosphorus to the Cappadocian valleys, the Mediterranean to the Black Sea — each destination is a different chapter of one journey. Scroll to travel.
hotels.subtitle: Handpicked five-star hotels and boutique retreats across Türkiye's most captivating cities — curated for the discerning traveler.
cta.body: Join thousands of travelers who have discovered Türkiye the PoliTrip way. Your perfect journey begins with a single call.
cta.footerNote: No booking fee. Response within 24 hours.
ribbon.headline: Every journey, a masterpiece
floating.whatsappMessage: Hello, I would like to inquire about a trip to Türkiye
floating.title: Chat with us on WhatsApp
floating.subtitle: Available 24/7
footer.brandBlurb: Crafting unforgettable luxury travel experiences across magnificent Türkiye.
slug.about.title: About Us
slug.about.headline: PoliTrip in brief
slug.about.body: We design premium journeys across Türkiye—VIP experiences, luxury stays, and seamless ground services from arrival to departure.
slug.team.title: Our Team
slug.team.headline: Concierge-first
slug.team.body: Arabic- and English-speaking planners, on-call duty staff, and vetted local partners keep every itinerary calm, clear, and on time.
slug.careers.title: Careers
slug.careers.headline: Join PoliTrip
slug.careers.body: We are growing our operations and guest-experience teams in Istanbul. Send your CV to careers@politrip.com—we read every message.
slug.press.title: Press
slug.press.headline: Media & partnerships
slug.press.body: For press kits, founder interviews, or partnership inquiries, write to press@politrip.com with your outlet and deadline.
slug.help.title: Help Center
slug.help.headline: Guest support
slug.help.body: For changes, refunds policy questions, or on-trip assistance, WhatsApp your duty number or email help@politrip.com with your booking reference.
slug.privacy.title: Privacy Policy
slug.privacy.headline: How we handle data
slug.privacy.body: We collect only what we need to run your trip—contacts, guest names, and booking references—and protect it with standard industry practices. A detailed policy will appear on this page soon.
slug.terms.title: Terms of Service
slug.terms.headline: Booking terms
slug.terms.body: Each proposal lists deposit, balance, and cancellation rules. A trip is confirmed once you approve the itinerary in writing and the agreed deposit is received.
slug.contact.title: Contact
slug.contact.headline: Reach PoliTrip
slug.contact.body: Email info@politrip.com, call any of the regional numbers in the site footer, or message us on WhatsApp. We typically reply within one business day.
